nasb.text: Now the town of Bethel had sent Sharezer and Regemmelech and their men to seek the favor of the Lord,

esv.text: Now the people of Bethel had sent Sharezer and Regem-melech and their men to entreat the favor of the Lord,

cnv.text: 那時，伯特利人差派了沙利色、利堅米勒和他的隨從，去懇求耶和華施恩。

ccb.text: 那时，伯特利人差遣沙利色、利坚米勒及其随从去向耶和华求恩。
